'''Mr. Wahl''' was a slacker who lived off the fortunes of his [[Doctor/Legends|surgeon]] wife, [[Wahl|Dr. Wahl]]. He shared a number of bad habits with his wife, such as [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]], which his son [[Kris Wahl|Kris]] also picked up. When it came to Kris's efforts at philanthropy, Mr. Wahl seemed to share his wife's opinions, disapproving of them as a waste of money. The Wahls were more concerned about Kris's association with [[Gerta Haman]] than they were about his gambling debts.

When Kris went missing in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Mr. Wahl and his wife assumed he had gone off with Gerta Haman on some sort of "foolish mission." This was not far from the truth, as he had joined her [[Cularin resistance]].

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1st}}
